name_cn:
NANO SPEEDY Handbag #️⃣M81085
Exclusive global launch! Customized with boutique craftsmanship, dynamic chip changing, original factory exclusive fabric, and original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color consistent with authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic feel! Exclusive original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, official website latest full gift box!
16 x 10 x 7.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Metal hardware
Zipper closure
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 45.5 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 59.0 cm
Handles: Double handles
Made in France
